title: centaurea × extranea
intro: Centaurea × extranea, also known as the Cornflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is often found in dry meadows and grasslands. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils. The health benefits of Centaurea × extranea include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from insomnia and other sleep disorders. Centaurea × extranea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
